title: ENHANCEMENT TO INCOME TAX (PETROLEUM) RETURN
text:
NOTICE
ENHANCEMENT TO INCOME TAX (PETROLEUM) RETURN
Revenue Division, Ministry of Finance and Economy, is pleased to introduce an updated form
for the Income Tax (Petroleum) Return filing under the Income Tax (Petroleum) Act, Chapter
119. This updated form is in line with the enhancement of System for Tax Administration dan
Revenue Services (STARS) which has been migrated to One Common Portal (OCP) and is
accessible for filing of Income Tax (Petroleum) Return starting Year of Assessment 2022 via
OCP.
For further enquiries or clarification please contact Revenue Division via email at
revenue@mofe.gov.bn; or call +673 2383933 or +673 2380651.
Ministry of Finance and Economy
Date: 7 November 2022
